entities.name: Insight
entities.context: Main analytical unit with required structured fields for programmatic extraction

entities.name: Signal Strength
entities.context: 1-5 rating system using filled/empty circles to indicate strength of insight

entities.name: Confidence Level
entities.context: HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW rating with reasoning to indicate certainty of insight

entities.name: GTM Strategy
entities.context: Category type for go-to-market strategic insights

entities.name: Market Pain Points
entities.context: Category type for customer/market problems and needs

entities.name: Competitive Landscape
entities.context: Category type for competitor analysis insights
